prompt:
Reference image role: the 404 prototype defines the visual DNA — an unfinished tree hollow with a broken wooden bridge leading to a glowing round paper moon-window over a misty mountain landscape with a full moon, hanging warn lanterns and a hanging wooden sign. PRESERVE this DNA exactly.

Create a wide full-page background for the 404 not-found page of "灵木洞天 / LYDT". 16:9 wide format.

Composition:
- Right 55%: A huge unfinished tree hollow that has not yet grown. Inside the hollow, a large round paper moon-window glows with a full moon high above misty distant mountains, cool moonlight #b8d4e0. A wooden plank bridge extends into the hollow but is broken/incomplete, half-built, suggesting "this path is not yet finished". Two warm lanterns hang on the right side near the entrance. A small hanging wooden sign on the right edge. Drifting fireflies #9CF0BD.
- Left 45%: Mostly empty dark atmospheric area for the large "404" headline, message, and 3 CTA buttons to be overlaid by HTML. Some scattered firefly motes and a few mossy roots for atmosphere. NO text in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern #ddb87a, full moon #d6e5ec, firefly #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, text, signs with readable characters, browser frames, neon, purple, red, MMORPG, oversaturated, cartoonish.
